main.description: A link between a Layers data record and an eprint.

eprintIdentifier.description: The eprint identifier (DOI, arXiv ID, ACL Anthology ID, etc.).

eprintIdentifierTypeUri.description: AT-URI of the identifier type definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

eprintIdentifierType.description: Identifier type slug (fallback when eprintIdentifierTypeUri unavailable).

platformEprintRefs.description: AT-URIs of the eprint record on its publication platforms (e.g., chive.pub, any ATProto-native publication service). An eprint may be mirrored on multiple platforms.

linkTypeUri.description: AT-URI of the link type definition node. Community-expandable via knowledge graph.

linkType.description: Link type slug (fallback when linkTypeUri unavailable).

expressionRefs.description: References to Layers expressions linked to this eprint.

annotationRefs.description: References to specific annotation records linked to this eprint.

citation.description: Bibliographic citation for the eprint. Carries rendered metadata (authors, title, venue, year) as a raw string and/or structured CSL-JSON/DataCite fields; eprintIdentifier/eprintIdentifierType remain the canonical link key.

knowledgeRefs.description: Knowledge graph references (e.g., Wikidata for the venue, DBLP, Semantic Scholar corpus ID).
